checks.name: Catalog Documentation
checks.description: CatalogInformation README: value proposition, key features, use cases, prerequisites, 1-3 screenshots. No mailto links, no version-pinned prerequisites.

checks.name: Source README
checks.description: Developer-oriented README in repo root covering architecture, getting started, project structure and contribution guide.

checks.name: Release Notes
checks.description: Release notes present for every release, written in plain language for non-technical audiences and published to the collaboration platform.

checks.name: SDM Compliance
checks.description: 3-layer SDM architecture: T1 (correct NuGet / namespace), T2 (typed domain helper with IRepository), T3 (SDM registration on installer). All tiers pass.

checks.name: Storage / DOM Objects
checks.description: DOM modules properly defined with SdmDomStorage and GenerateExposers attributes. Module IDs registered in global DOM module registry.

checks.name: SRM Resource Types
checks.description: Profile definitions and resource pool types mapped. Resources correctly linked to SDM entities.

checks.name: Inter-Solution References
checks.description: Which solutions reference which other solutions' API helpers. Cross-solution dependency graph is known and documented.

checks.name: Typed API Objects
checks.description: IXxxApiHelper with IBulkRepository<T> or IObservableRepository<T> typed properties. Consumable by AI and UI without reading DOM storage directly.

checks.name: GQI & User-Defined APIs
checks.description: Ad-hoc GQI data sources and User-Defined API endpoints exposed for dashboards, low-code apps, and external consumers.

checks.name: NuGet Devpack Published
checks.description: Public NuGet devpack available so consumers reference typed models without needing solution source. Published on NuGet.org or internal feed.

checks.name: Component Privacy
checks.description: Only the main solution package is publicly visible in the Catalog. Sub-components used exclusively within the solution are marked private.

checks.name: Naming Convention
checks.description: Files, classes, namespaces and catalog component names follow Skyline naming conventions (SLC-S-* pattern, correct prefixes).

checks.name: Automated Tests
checks.description: Unit tests and/or regression tests present and passing in CI. Coverage sufficient to catch regressions.

checks.name: CI/CD Pipeline
checks.description: GitHub Actions pipeline active: builds on PR, tests run automatically, package published on release tag.

checks.name: Dependency Health
checks.description: NuGet packages up-to-date, no deprecated packages, no version drift across solutions consuming shared SDM packages.

checks.name: Health & Freshness
checks.description: Recent commits, low open-issue count, CI green, regular releases. Signals the solution is actively maintained.

checks.name: Low-Code App
checks.description: DataMiner low-code app present and functional. Clear navigation, consistent layout, operators can use it without training.

checks.name: Demo / Mock Mode
checks.description: Mocked demo data injected through the API so POs and prospects can evaluate the solution without a live system or real data.

checks.name: LCA UX Audit
checks.description: DataMiner LCA UX audit passes: DataMiner style guide compliance, consistent spacing/typography, status chips, proper empty states.

checks.name: Product Owner
checks.description: CODEOWNERS file present with a named Product Owner. Clear ownership, accountability and roadmap responsibility.

checks.name: Active Backlog
checks.description: GitHub Issues or Projects backlog actively maintained. Roadmap visible, user feedback tracked, issues triaged promptly.

checks.name: Catalog Published
checks.description: Published in dataminer.services Catalog as 'Standard Solution' type with semantic versioning. Main range tagged. Actively releasing updates.
